channel.title: Um Actually
channel.description: Latest releases from Um Actually on Dropout.tv

item.title: Zig, Garrick, and Thundercat Weeb Out
item.description:
Cody, Garrick, and Thundercat show off their anime expertise and reminisce about Suncoast Video.

Duration: 29:47

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, game shows, unscripted, trivia, pop culture, nerds, superfans, internet, one of these things is not like the other, this vs that, how it happened, jumping the shark, cody ziglar, garrick bernard, thundercat, d.j. mausner

item.title: Um, Actually Season 11 Trailer
item.description:
It’s time to turn things up to eleven. New season premieres January 20th.

Duration: 01:51

Tags: Um Actually, ify nwadiwe, brian david gilbert, game shows, unscripted, trivia, pop culture, nerds, superfans, internet, one of these things is not like the other, this vs that, how it happened, jumping the shark
